blocks.text: Barcelona 7-2 Newcastle: Blaugrana send shockwaves through the Champions League

Barcelona were ruthless, Liverpool clinical. Both look ominous in Europe — yet Liverpool's 5th-place PL standing (49pts) means domestic pressure never lets up. Today, Hovland tries to claw back ground at Valspar.
♟️ Thu 17:00 — Christiansen opens BTC Chess960 Championship Survival stage in Roatán

blocks.label: ⚽ Weekend must-watch
items: Sat 13:30 — Liverpool at Brighton — 5th place, every point counts
Sat 16:00 — Crystal Palace at Man City — City (2nd, 61pts) must keep pace with Arsenal
Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle — Tyne-Wear derby returns
Sun 14:00 — Rayo Vallecano at Barcelona — La Liga title push at Camp Nou
